title: Kill Factor
description: This plugin allows the players to be rewarded money for killing other players based on their KDR and their respective kills of each other
body:
This plugin optimizes the rewards players get for killing each other.
It compares the killers KDR to the victim's, and also checks how many times the killer has already killed the victim to prevent farming money on only one player, if a weaker player kills someone better than them they get awarded more money
